name: Leadbetter Golf Academy Miami
about: GOLFZON Leadbetter Academy combines state-of-the-art instruction with advanced golf technology to provide a comprehensive training experience. The facility is designed for golf enthusiasts of all skill levels, offering personalized coaching in a modern, cutting-edge environment. It operates as a full-service academy with dedicated programs for juniors, adult players, and instructors, alongside advanced amenities like simulators and club fitting services. The academy focuses on developing both technical skills and strategic thinking, with a curriculum that integrates academic studies, fitness, and social development for its full-time junior program students.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to GOLFZON GDR MAX simulator technology for realistic practice sessions
Integration of Puttview projection technology for advanced putting analysis
Fully private facility with three separate 18-hole courses and a dedicated training regimen
Expert coaching from award-winning instructors with personalized training programs
Industry-leading 99% college placement rate for junior golf program participants

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service is mentioned in the provided content.
No alcohol service is mentioned in the provided content.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator technology with multiple dedicated rooms for training

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or utilize the custom club fitting services available at the academy to get properly fitted equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted, as the facility appears to focus solely on golf training and instruction.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Standard simulator time is typically booked by the hour, with 18 holes taking approximately 45-60 minutes depending on player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers specialized junior golf programs, camps, and morning programs for kids, with a dedicated curriculum that includes academic studies and fitness training.
